issues.description: Condition checks if a card with name 'The Seven Warlords of the Sea' is on board, but the card text specifies 'If your Leader has the {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type' — this should check the Leader's type, not board presence. Use LeaderHasType condition instead.

The effect is missing the optional first clause: 'You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand' (without cost restriction). The DSL should represent both the unconditional option and the conditional option with cost restriction.

condition.value: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
